critical_issues.description: GET and POST endpoints for documents lack authentication checks. Any unauthenticated user can read/create documents.
critical_issues.severity_justification: Complete lack of authentication allows unauthorized access to sensitive document data. Database queries execute without verifying user identity.
critical_issues.recommended_fix:
1. Extract userId from authenticated session/token
2. Add ownership validation: where: { projectId, userId }
3. Return 401 if userId missing
4. Validate projectId ownership before returning data

critical_issues.description: GET endpoint for insights has no authentication. Returns all insights matching projectId/type regardless of user.
critical_issues.severity_justification: Allows any user to query insights from any project. No ownership validation prevents cross-user data access.
critical_issues.recommended_fix: Add authentication check and ownership validation before querying insights

critical_issues.description: GET endpoint for themes lacks authentication. No user verification before returning theme data.
critical_issues.severity_justification: Unauthenticated access to theme data. projectId alone is insufficient without userId and ownership verification.
critical_issues.recommended_fix: Implement authentication middleware and add userId-based ownership filtering

critical_issues.description: GET endpoint for personas has no authentication. Returns persona data without verifying requesting user.
critical_issues.severity_justification: Complete absence of user identification allows data breach. Any client can retrieve all personas.
critical_issues.recommended_fix: Add authentication requirement and restrict to user's own projects

critical_issues.description: GET endpoint for opportunities has no authentication. Any user can query opportunities without verification.
critical_issues.severity_justification: Opportunities data is business-sensitive. Unauthenticated access allows competitive intelligence gathering.
critical_issues.recommended_fix: Implement user authentication and ownership validation

critical_issues.description: GET and POST endpoints for reports lack authentication. Unauthenticated users can read/create reports.
critical_issues.severity_justification: Reports contain aggregated sensitive analysis data. No auth allows unauthorized report access and creation.
critical_issues.recommended_fix: Add authentication headers validation and userId-based filtering

critical_issues.description: Chat endpoint has no authentication check. Also accepts userId from request body (can be spoofed). No body validation.
critical_issues.severity_justification: Users can impersonate others by sending arbitrary userId. No validation of projectId or message content. Can access other users' chat history.
critical_issues.recommended_fix:
1. Extract userId from authenticated session, never from request body
2. Validate body with chatMessageSchema
3. Verify projectId ownership
4. Add authentication middleware

critical_issues.description: POST /api/documents accepts body directly without validation. Allows injection of arbitrary data.
critical_issues.severity_justification: No validation means malformed or malicious data can be stored in database. No schema enforcement on document creation.
critical_issues.recommended_fix: Use fileUploadSchema or documentSchema to validate body before database insert

critical_issues.description: POST /api/reports accepts body without validation. Allows creation of malformed reports.
critical_issues.severity_justification: No schema validation permits injection attacks and data integrity violations.
critical_issues.recommended_fix: Validate with schema before creating report in database

critical_issues.description: Demo credentials hardcoded in login page: email='demo@example.com', password='Demo@123456'. Displayed in UI and code.
critical_issues.severity_justification: Production security risk. Credentials visible in source code, network requests, and UI. Anyone with access can gain account entry.
critical_issues.recommended_fix:
1. Replace with environment variable demo credentials
2. Remove credentials from signup auth check
3. Use JWT/proper auth flow
4. Implement environment-based demo mode
5. Never show credentials in error messages

critical_issues.description: JSON.parse() called without try/catch wrapper. Malformed JSON in report.content crashes component.
critical_issues.severity_justification: SyntaxError from parsing invalid JSON will crash the entire reports page, causing DoS and poor UX.
critical_issues.code_snippet:
const content = JSON.parse(report.content);
const dataStr = JSON.stringify(content, null, 2);
critical_issues.recommended_fix: Wrap JSON.parse() in try/catch block with user-friendly error handling

high_issues.description: localStorage.getItem() and setItem() called without try/catch. SSR will crash on server-side rendering.
high_issues.severity_justification: Throws ReferenceError: localStorage is not defined when running on server. No error boundary causes app crashes.
high_issues.code_snippet:
const stored = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
return stored ? JSON.parse(stored) : memoryStorage;
high_issues.recommended_fix:
1. Wrap localStorage access in try/catch
2. Check typeof window !== 'undefined' (already done but not in try/catch)
3. Handle parse errors separately

high_issues.description: localStorage.getItem('auth_token') called without try/catch in request interceptor.
high_issues.severity_justification: Crashes every API request if localStorage is unavailable. No fallback for SSR or edge runtime.
high_issues.recommended_fix: Wrap in try/catch and provide safe default (null)

high_issues.description: localStorage.setItem() called without try/catch in handleSubmit(). Fails silently if quota exceeded or unavailable.
high_issues.severity_justification: User thinks they're logged in but session not saved. No error feedback about storage failure.
high_issues.recommended_fix: Wrap localStorage operations in try/catch with user feedback

high_issues.description: localStorage.setItem() in signup without try/catch. Storage failure not handled or reported.
high_issues.severity_justification: Registration completes but session not stored. User redirected to dashboard without valid auth state.
high_issues.recommended_fix: Add try/catch block with error handling and user notification

high_issues.description: Projects filtered by userId from header only. No verification that header value matches authenticated user.
high_issues.severity_justification: Client can spoof x-user-id header to access other users' projects. Header is not a secure auth mechanism.
high_issues.recommended_fix: Extract userId from JWT/session, never from custom headers. Verify token signature.

high_issues.description: setTimeout() used instead of proper async/await for chat query. No error handling on promise chain.
high_issues.severity_justification: Errors in processChatQuery() not caught. Loading state can persist if error occurs. Poor UX and hard to debug.
high_issues.recommended_fix: Use async/await with proper try/catch. Handle processChatQuery() errors.

high_issues.description: File upload uses nested setTimeout promises without error boundaries. Progress state not synchronized with actual uploads.
high_issues.severity_justification: Upload failures leave progress bar in loading state. User can't retry or know what failed.
high_issues.recommended_fix: Replace with proper async file upload handling with error recovery

high_issues.description: Middleware has demo mode allowing all dashboard routes without authentication. demoAllowedRoutes bypass all auth checks.
high_issues.severity_justification: Production deployment with demo mode enables complete auth bypass. Any user accesses any dashboard page without login.
high_issues.recommended_fix:
1. Remove demo mode routes from production
2. Implement proper session/JWT verification
3. Use middleware to check auth status before allowing access
4. Redirect unauthenticated users to /login

immediate_actions: Remove hardcoded demo credentials from codebase
Implement ownership validation for all database queries
Add try/catch around all JSON.parse() calls
Secure localStorage access with error handling
Validate all POST request bodies with schemas
implementation_priority: 1. Secure API routes (add auth header extraction, verify ownership)
5. Wrap localStorage access in try/catch (4 locations)
6. Validate all POST bodies (documents, reports, chat)
7. Fix promise handling in Chat and Upload pages

affected_areas.api_routes: All 8 GET/POST endpoints need auth + validation
